barbarian.name: Barbarian
barbarian.description: A relentless warrior who dominates through a flurry of auto-attacks.

knight.name: Knight
knight.description: A stalwart defender capable of devastating mounted maneuvers.

monk.name: Monk
monk.description: A high-flow martial artist focused on stances and evasion.

mage.name: Mage
mage.description: A glass weaver who trades physical stamina for high-impact arcane logic.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.description: A shadow-dweller who uses precision to bypass armor.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: The party's logistics officer. Manages stamina and cleanses statuses.

defiler.name: Defiler
defiler.description: A dark caster who siphons life and applies debilitating toxins.

beastmaster.name: Beastmaster
beastmaster.description: A commander of the wild who uses pets to harass enemies.

red_mage.name: Red Mage
red_mage.description: A versatile hybrid who weaves martial prowess with white and black magic.

warlock.name: Warlock
warlock.description: An anti-mage juggernaut who scales power with suffering and shuts down enemy engines.

illusionist.name: Illusionist
illusionist.description: A master of deception who manipulates reality to evade and confuse foes.
